CVE-2025-66422.description: Tryton trytond before 7.6.11 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive trace-back (server setup) information. This is fixed in 7.6.11, 7.4.21, 7.0.40, and 6.0.70.

CVE-2025-66423.description: Tryton trytond 6.0 before 7.6.11 does not enforce access rights for the route of the HTML editor. This is fixed in 7.6.11, 7.4.21, 7.0.40, and 6.0.70.

CVE-2025-66424.description: Tryton trytond 6.0 before 7.6.11 does not enforce access rights for data export. This is fixed in 7.6.11, 7.4.21, 7.0.40, and 6.0.70.
